deprecation_criterion: when the [rabbit] print convention is replaced by a structured logging facility

policy-drift.text: Policy drift detected — CLAUDE.md regenerated from source files

scope-guard-bypassed.text: SCOPE GUARD BYPASSED (one-time override consumed — guard re-armed)

human-approval-bypass.text: HUMAN APPROVAL BYPASS ACTIVE — Step 4 skipped for all rabbit-feature-touch dispatches

bypass-permissions-active.text: BYPASS-PERMISSIONS MODE ACTIVE — Claude Code native per-write prompts skipped; scope-guard hook is the sole write-authorization gate

skills-updated.text: Skills updated: {names} — will reload automatically on next invocation

dispatch-bypass-note.text: NOTE: human-approval bypass marker is active (.rabbit-human-approval-bypass). Step 4 HUMAN-APPROVAL will be skipped for this dispatch. Revoke via `/rabbit-config human-approval true`.
